raw_consumer_statement: I started the process of ordering medication through XXXX XXXX for {$190.00} but decided against it. I spoke with XXXX XXXX  and they cancelled my account and sent me an email to verify and stated in their email that they have not received any funds therefore I need to contact my credit card, Barclay. I filed several disputes and each have been denied. I have been dealing with this since XX/XX/year>.
